intro: Upload a document such as a paper or contract (<0>Word</0> <1>.docx</1> / PDF / structured XML <2>.xml</2>) and, with <3>no AI design needed</3>, it is structured down to <4>section → paragraph → sentence</4>, so you can <5>full-text search and cite</5> it from the dataset's "Tools" tab.
convertHint: Word (.docx) and PDF (.pdf) are automatically converted to structured XML on the server (the conversion tool and version are recorded in the provenance). PDF takes a little longer for layout-aware conversion.
retryResumes: The dataset was already created. Retrying resumes ingesting the same document "{{name}}" — it does not create a duplicate.
result: ✓ Published <0>{{name}}</0>. Open it in Datasets and use <1>search_text</1> /<2>quote_with_citation</2> on the "Tools" tab to full-text search and cite it.
